title.en: Configuration of Security or Privacy Policy Filters

prose.en: Provide the capability for privileged administrators to configure {param:ac-4.11_prm_1} to support different security or privacy policies.

parameters.name: ac-4.11_prm_1
parameters.label: organization-defined security or privacy policy filters

guidance.en: Documentation contains detailed information for configuring security or privacy policy filters. For example, administrators can configure security or privacy policy filters to include the list of inappropriate words that security or privacy policy mechanisms check in accordance with the definitions provided by organizations.

prose.en: capability is provided for privileged administrators to configure {param:ac-04.11_odp.01} to support different security or privacy policies;
capability is provided for privileged administrators to configure {param:ac-04.11_odp.02} to support different security or privacy policies.

objects.en: system configuration settings and associated documentation
Organizational personnel with responsibilities for configuring security and privacy policy filters
organizational personnel with information security and privacy responsibilities
Mechanisms implementing information flow enforcement policy

guidelines.en: security policy filters that privileged administrators have the capability to configure to support different security and privacy policies are defined;
privacy policy filters that privileged administrators have the capability to configure to support different security and privacy policies are defined;
